text.title: Maintain Mode SOPs Solo Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Maintain Mode SOPs Solo. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: name-cadences
step.action: Lock weekly / monthly / quarterly / on-call cadences with duration caps.

step.name: fill-tasks-per-cadence
step.action: Name 2-5 tasks per cadence with explicit owner.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
